login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Access your premium stock intelligence dashboard.

signup.step1Subtitle: Enter your email and verify your address using real-time OTP delivery.
signup.step2Subtitle: Complete legal compliance onboarding to start tracking stock insights.
signup.step3Subtitle: Specify your trading goals so the AI agent can curate customized technical signals.
signup.step4Subtitle: Please review and accept our SEBI-compliant Advisory Disclaimer.
signup.disclaimerText: I understand and accept that this platform provides algorithmic research insights and AI-driven stock reports, not investment advice.

landing.description: AI Stock Kundli analyzes every listed company across fundamentals, technicals, news sentiment, and risk — then explains its reasoning in plain language.
